_comment: Events merged from events_tracker.xlsx (user tracker) + MICE research. Demand mapping: High+40%+ markup=Very High, High=High, Medium-High=High, Medium=Moderate, Low-Medium=Low-Moderate, Low=Low. Low* are hidden from the events table but kept for reference.

events.name: Singapore Data Festival (SDF)
events.rationale: Quays & Chinatown - short transit to MBS once 5-star fill; delegate/per-diem base | Suggested markup: 10-15% | Confirmed
events.best_fit: Quays & Chinatown - short transit to MBS once 5-star fill; delegate/per-diem base

events.name: EXO
events.attendees: Korea + SEA regional, local — likely-to-book: Direct-strong
events.rationale: on KG / on Victoria - nearest Kallang; SOLD OUT, 2nd date added | Suggested markup: 25-35% | Confirmed
events.best_fit: on KG / on Victoria - nearest Kallang; SOLD OUT, 2nd date added

events.name: The Business Show Asia
events.rationale: SME crowd is price-conscious - good fit for 3.5-star CBD shophouse near MBS. Check materialization vs past business shows.

events.name: Seafood Expo Asia
events.rationale: International trade adults staying multiple nights; mid-tier accommodation typical for exhibitor staff.

events.name: Medical Fair Asia + Medical Manufacturing Asia + OS+H Asia (co-located)
events.attendees: Asia's largest medical equipment show; tens of thousands, international trade adults
events.rationale: Large co-located trade cluster = strong overnight demand across price tiers near CBD. Historically materializes. Hold rates high; only cut if own occupancy lags <85% inside 7 days.

events.name: Firdhaus 'Flat Earth Theory'
events.rationale: slight KG affinity; mostly local same-day | Suggested markup: 0-8% | Confirmed
events.best_fit: slight KG affinity; mostly local same-day

events.name: MRO Asia Pacific
events.rationale: Venue is far east side - attendees cluster near Changi/Expo, weak driver for CBD shophouse stock.
